case_title: PRIME APARTMENT PROPERTIES, LLC. VS. MONICA MORENO et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF ORDER TO AMEND JUDGMENT AND ENTER MONEY JUDGMENT, FILED
DECLARATION OF JEFFREY MARGULIES UPON A BREACH FILED BY PLAINTIFF PRIME APARTMENT PROPERTIES, LLC.
ORDER AMEND JUDGMENT AND ENTER MONEY JUDGMENT
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF PRIME APARTMENT PROPERTIES, LLC.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MORENO, MONICA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 676 GEARY STREET, #505, SEE SCANNED DOC NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED

EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER IN SUPPORT OF REQUEST TO VACATE JUSGMENT FOR POSSESSION AND RESTITUTION OF PREMISES AND FOR MONEY JUDGMENT;, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF PRIME APARTMENT PROPERTIES, LLC.

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PRIME APARTMENT PROPERTIES, LLC. AS TO DEFENDANT MORENO, MONICA DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ( FIRST FILING FEE FOR DEFT. MONICA MORENO) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PRIME APARTMENT PROPERTIES, LLC. AS TO DEFENDANT MORENO, MONICA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PRIME APARTMENT PROPERTIES, LLC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MORENO, MONICA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: DEFENDANT VACATED PREMISES $6,257.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,257.00, SEE SCANNED DOC NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
